name: Aurora Innovation, Inc.

profile.description: Aurora Innovation develops the Aurora Driver, a self-driving technology platform for autonomous trucking and ride-hailing. The company has partnerships with PACCAR, Volvo, and Continental for autonomous commercial vehicles.

innovation.label: STRONG
innovation.analysis: Scored 7/10 based on track record, AI deployment, market position, pipeline visibility, and R&D intensity. See yfinance data and web research for evidence [1].

inspiration.label: DEVELOPING
inspiration.analysis: Scored 5/10 based on mission quality, community impact, employee retention, and insider buying signals [1].

infrastructure.label: WEAK
infrastructure.analysis: Mechanically scored on available metrics. Liquidity passes ($163,283,064 daily) [1].

ai_resilience.label: HIGH RISK
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (3/9) + AI Opportunity (1/1) = 4/10. Scored based on business model's structural exposure or immunity to AI disruption [1].

infinite_game.summary: Scored 6/10 using 3-2-2-2-1 weighted framework (Just Cause, Courage, Trust, Flexibility, Rivals).
